ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Jimmy Kimmel Live!
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Live: Inside the NBA
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: This Emmy Award-winning studio show, which airs following NBA telecasts on ESPN, is hosted by Ernie Johnson, with analysis from Hall of Famer Charles Barkley and NBA champions Kenny Smith and Shaquille O'Neal. It's a mix of highlights, interviews and hijinks, notably the verbal sparring sessions between the outspoken Barkley and his straight man, Smith. The show also welcomes various guest analysts throughout the season.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

HBO.West.us2.description: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

Accompanied by her two investigative partners, Rainier travels to Five Keys to confront and destroy her greatest fear -- the demon that she accidentally set free years earlier.

When his second-in-command, Officer Dixon -- an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence -- gets involved, the battle is only exacerbated.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.West.us2.description: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Mummy Returns
HBO.West.us2.description: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

HBO.West.us2.title: Flow
HBO.West.us2.description: Cat is a solitary animal, but as its home is devastated by a great flood, he finds refuge on a boat populated by various species, and will have to team up with them despite their differences.

HBO.West.us2.title: Greenland
HBO.West.us2.description: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

HBO.West.us2.title: Greenland 2: Migration
HBO.West.us2.description: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

HBO.West.us2.title: Twister
HBO.West.us2.description: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rocket Science
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: High-school student Hal Hefner's (Reece Daniel Thompson) life is falling down around him. His parents have split, his brother picks on him incessantly, and he has a terrible stutter. Hal cannot believe it when Ginny Ryerson (Anna Kendrick), a pretty classmate, asks him to join their school's debate team. Falling head over heels in love with Ginny, he agrees to her request, with unexpected results.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: House Party
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Sorry, Baby
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Comeback
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Valerie Stands Up for Aunt Sassy
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Valerie is concerned about her character's lines; Valerie rethinks her impulsive decision to adopt a puppy.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Comeback
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Valerie Lights a Candle
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Valerie Cherish stars in a sitcom written by artificial intelligence, which presents her with bizarre challenges.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Get Him to the Greek
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Switch
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spring Breakers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wilson
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Girls Trip
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: MacGruber
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shadows
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A high school student exploring her independence on homecoming night is disrupted by her older brother and the shadows of their past.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Color Theories by Julio Torres
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In his second HBO comedy special, Peabody-winner Julio Torres presents a helpful guide to understanding the world through his playful interpretations of colors.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Brett Goldstein: The Second Best Night of Your Life
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Brett Goldstein, a comedian, writer, actor and swimmer, begins his next big adventure.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Sarah Squirm: Live + in the Flesh
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Sarah Sherman's unholy alter ego, Sarah Squirm, unleashes a festering hour of bodily fluids, open-wound confessionals and jokes that will leave scars on the soul.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: A Minecraft Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Gloria and her recently widowed grandfather Bud befriend a mysterious reindeer when the family gathers for Christmas. Bud comes to believe that Prancer may actually be magical, but Gloria fears his theory will send him straight to a retirement home. They try to keep the secret while figuring out why the reindeer has appeared, and longstanding rifts within the family are healed along the way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

Accompanied by three mischievous lemmings, Norm stows away on a ship to New York. HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Puss in Boots
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Table 19
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Switch

When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Battle of the Sexes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Moonlight
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A look at three defining chapters in the life of Chiron, a young black man growing up in Miami. His epic journey to manhood is guided by the kindness, support and love of the community that helps raise him.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Shape of Water
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works as a cleaning lady in a hidden, high-security government laboratory in 1962 Baltimore. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Legend of Ochi
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In a remote village on the island of Carpathia, a shy farm girl named Yuri is raised to fear elusive animals known as ochi. But when Yuri discovers a wounded baby ochi has been left behind, she escapes on a quest to bring him home.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dune
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dune: Part Two
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Fire and Water

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Twilight
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance

Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Smoking Tigers
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: My Cousin Rachel
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mortician

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mortician

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mortician
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Members of the Lamb family are convicted of various crimes, including fraud; while in prison, a murder charge is brought against David for the death of his competitor.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Witch
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1630 New England, panic and despair envelops a farmer, his wife and their children when youngest son Samuel suddenly vanishes. The family blames Thomasin, the oldest daughter who was watching the boy at the time of his disappearance. With suspicion and paranoia mounting, twin siblings Mercy and Jonas suspect Thomasin of witchcraft, testing the clan's faith, loyalty and love to one another.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Bring Her Back
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A brother and sister uncover a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Men
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Freaky Tales
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: While We're Young
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Man of Steel
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With the imminent destruction of Krypton, their home planet, Jor-El (Russell Crowe) and his wife seek to preserve their race by sending their infant son to Earth. The child's spacecraft lands at the farm of Jonathan (Kevin Costner) and Martha (Diane Lane) Kent, who name him Clark and raise him as their own son. Though his extraordinary abilities have led to the adult Clark (Henry Cavill) living on the fringe of society, he finds he must become a hero to save those he loves from a dire threat.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Black Adam
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Life of Pi
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. Power plant workers who were tasked with averting a major catastrophe by doing a potential suicide mission. These 50 workers recount the mounting pressures they faced as they entered the darkened reactors to try to avert the worst outcome.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spring Awakening: Those You've Known

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Gracias a una nueva relación que le aporta estabilidad, Dean recupera el equilibrio emocional y su sueño de toda la vida de volar se hace realidad cuando se sumerge en el vanguardista mundo del vuelo con traje alado.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Una heroína inesperada debe usar sus nuevos poderes para luchar contra los desconcertantes peligros del multiverso y así lograr salvar su mundo.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Euphoria
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: A Rue le proponen un trato arriesgado que la sumerge aún más en el mundo de Alamo. Nate se enfrenta al ayuntamiento. Maddy le encarga a Cassie una misión que podría catapultar su nueva carrera. Lexi le pide a Jules que cree un cuadro original para LA Nights.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Half Man
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Rubén, un supuesto hermano con el que Niall no se habla, aparece en su boda, lo que desata una explosión de violencia en la que se rememoran sus vidas, desde los años ochenta hasta la actualidad.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Marty Supreme
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: En un mundo de ambiciones y excesos, Marty persigue un sueño que nadie toma en serio: convertirse en un ícono del tenis de mesa. Con un talento innato y una personalidad magnética, su obsesiva búsqueda de éxito y reconocimiento lo lleva a una espiral de fama y caos que lo arrastran a su redención.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Habla Ya, Part I
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: La gente comparte historias de lo que significa ser latino en Nueva York.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Habla Ya, Part II
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: La gente comparte historias de lo que significa ser latino en Nueva York.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Entre Nos Presents: Nick Guerra: Love Me at My Worst
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: La presentación del comediante texano Nick Guerra.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Angel Rodriguez
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Una trabajadora social encinta de Nueva York (Rachel Griffiths) intenta ayudar a una adolescente en problemas (Jonan Everett) cuyo padre (David Zayas) la corrió de su casa.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Una mujer cuya hija fue asesinada se enfrenta a la policía usando los carteles publicitarios para denunciar que han pasado meses desde que se cometió el crimen y no solo no han resuelto nada, sino que parecen no tener interés en hacerlo.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Luego de triunfar dentro y fuera del aula, Greg motiva al equipo de hockey antes de un partido clave. Archie recibe comentarios sobre su libro. Katie concentra sus esfuerzos en conseguir la titularidad, lo que revela qué tan involucrados están sus padres en su vida.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Comeback
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Valerie intenta reparar el daño causado por la prensa negativa sobre la IA y salvar el trabajo de Mark en el reality show apareciendo en "Finance Dudes".

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Ahmanet, una antigua y maldita princesa egipcia, despierta furiosa y siembra el terror entre los humanos. Solo un intrépido mercenario podrá detenerla y evitar que su ira destruya Londres.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Mummy Returns
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: El hijo del aventurero Rick O'Connell y su esposa son el centro del horrible plan que tiene Imhotep para dominar al mundo.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Flow
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: El gato es un animal solitario, pero cuando su hogar es devastado por una gran inundación, encuentra refugio en un barco habitado por varias especies y tendrá que trabajar en equipo con ellas, a pesar de sus diferencias.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: The Dark Wizard
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Gracias a una nueva relación que le aporta estabilidad, Dean recupera el equilibrio emocional y su sueño de toda la vida de volar se hace realidad cuando se sumerge en el vanguardista mundo del vuelo con traje alado.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Entre Nos: Spot On
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Los comediantes Crystian Ramírez, Vanessa González, Rojo Pérez y Erik Rivera se turnan al micrófono para compartir sus graciosas anécdotas sobre la vida, el amor y lo que significa ser latinos.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Half Man
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Es 1987. Las familias de Niall y Rubén se unen, lo que hace que generen un vínculo estrecho e inquietante. Una exploración íntima y épica de lo que significa ser hombre.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Half Man
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: En 1989, Niall está pasando por un mal momento en la universidad, e invita a Rubén a unirse a él y a sus compañeros de apartamento para la semana de bienvenida. Lo que comienza con mucha ilusión termina teniendo consecuencias devastadoras.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Half Man
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Rubén, un supuesto hermano con el que Niall no se habla, aparece en su boda, lo que desata una explosión de violencia en la que se rememoran sus vidas, desde los años ochenta hasta la actualidad.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: El día del fin del mundo
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Una familia emprende un viaje para encontrar un refugio seguro cuando un gran cometa arremete contra la Tierra. A medida que el apocalipsis se acerca, la increíble travesía termina en una batalla de último minuto para llegar a puerto seguro.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Greenland 2: Migration
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Cinco años después de que la Tierra estuvo al borde de la extinción, la familia Garrity abandona su búnker en Groenlandia para hacer un nuevo y desesperado intento por sobrevivir. En una carrera contrarreloj, cruzarán los territorios devastados de Europa en busca de otro refugio antes de que la siguiente catástrofe los alcance.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.title: Twister
HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: En esta película en donde priman los efectos especiales, dos científicos persiguen tornados para estudiarlos. Además de las impresionantes tormentas, hay tramas secundarias que tocan temas tales como los problemas matrimoniales, los traumas infantiles y la ética corporativa. La película recibió múltiples premios Oscar por su sonido y sus efectos especiales fuera de serie.

HBO.Latino.HD.us2.description: Tras encontrarse con Gwen Stacy, el agradable vecindario de Brooklyn en el que vive Miles Morales se ve transportado al multiverso, donde Spider-Man conocerá a nuevos personajes y vivirá aventuras increíbles.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Italian Job
AMC.HD.us2.description: After a heist in Venice, Steve turns on his partners in crime, killing safecracker John Bridger and keeping all the gold for himself; the rest of the team, including leader Charlie Croker, driver Handsome Rob, explosives man Left Ear and tech geek Lyle, vows revenge; they enlist the help of Bridger's daughter, Stella and plot to recover the gold from Steve's Los Angeles mansion.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Deepwater Horizon
AMC.HD.us2.description: On April 20, 2010, the Deepwater Horizon drilling rig explodes in the Gulf of Mexico, igniting a massive fireball that kills several crew members. Chief electronics technician Mike Williams (Mark Wahlberg) and his colleagues find themselves fighting for survival as the heat and the flames become stifling and overwhelming. Banding together, the co-workers must use their wits to make it out alive amid all the chaos.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Perfect Storm
AMC.HD.us2.description: Based on a true story, the film tells of the courageous men and women who risk their lives every working day, pitting their fishing boats and rescue vessels against the capricious forces of nature. Their worst fears are realized at sea on Halloween of 1991, when they are confronted by three raging weather fronts which unexpectedly collide to produce the greatest, fiercest storm in modern history -- "The Perfect Storm.".

AMC.HD.us2.title: Shooter
AMC.HD.us2.description: A top Marine sniper, Bob Lee Swagger, leaves the military after a mission goes awry and disappears without a trace. Swagger is coaxed back into service after high-profile government officials convince him to help thwart a plot against the President of the United States. Swagger realizes he has been betrayed and becomes the target of a nationwide manhunt. Instead of hiding, he seeks revenge against some of the most powerful and corrupt leaders in the free world.

AMC.HD.us2.title: American Sniper
AMC.HD.us2.description: U.S. Navy SEAL Chris Kyle (Bradley Cooper) takes his sole mission -- protect his comrades -- to heart and becomes one of the most lethal snipers in American history. His pinpoint accuracy not only saves countless lives but also makes him a prime target of insurgents. Despite grave danger and his struggle to be a good husband and father to his family back in the States, Kyle serves four tours of duty in Iraq. However, when he finally returns home, he finds that he cannot leave the war behind.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Midway
AMC.HD.us2.description: On Dec. 7, 1941, Japanese forces launch a devastating attack on Pearl Harbor, the U.S. naval base in Hawaii. Six months later, the Battle of Midway commences on June 4, 1942, as the Japanese navy once again plans a strike against American ships in the Pacific. For the next three days, the U.S. Navy and a squad of brave fighter pilots engage the enemy in one of the most important and decisive battles of World War II.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Black Hawk Down
AMC.HD.us2.description: In 1993, the U.S. sends special forces into Somalia to destabilize the government and bring food and humanitarian aid to the starving population. Using Black Hawk helicopters to lower the soldiers onto the ground, an unexpected attack by Somalian forces brings two of the helicopters down immediately. From there, the U.S. soldiers must struggle to regain their balance while enduring heavy gunfire.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rambo III
AMC.HD.us2.description: Reluctant one-man army Rambo goes into action against Soviet invaders in Afghanistan. Sought out in a Buddhist monastery retreat, Rambo declines his former commander's request for help to deliver missiles to the mujahideen, but when his superior is captured and imprisoned, the hulking hero brings out the big guns.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Rambo: Last Blood
AMC.HD.us2.description: Vietnam War veteran John Rambo tries to find some semblance of peace by raising horses on a ranch in Arizona. He's also developed a special familial bond with a woman named Maria and her teenage granddaughter Gabriela. But when a vicious Mexican cartel kidnaps Gabriela, Rambo crosses the border on a bloody and personal quest to rescue her and punish those responsible.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Midway
AMC.HD.us2.description: On Dec. 7, 1941, Japanese forces launch a devastating attack on Pearl Harbor, the U.S. naval base in Hawaii. Six months later, the Battle of Midway commences on June 4, 1942, as the Japanese navy once again plans a strike against American ships in the Pacific. For the next three days, the U.S. Navy and a squad of brave fighter pilots engage the enemy in one of the most important and decisive battles of World War II.

AMC.HD.us2.title: American Sniper
AMC.HD.us2.description: U.S. Navy SEAL Chris Kyle (Bradley Cooper) takes his sole mission -- protect his comrades -- to heart and becomes one of the most lethal snipers in American history. His pinpoint accuracy not only saves countless lives but also makes him a prime target of insurgents. Despite grave danger and his struggle to be a good husband and father to his family back in the States, Kyle serves four tours of duty in Iraq. However, when he finally returns home, he finds that he cannot leave the war behind.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Book of Eli
AMC.HD.us2.description: Thirty years after war turned the world into a wasteland, a lone warrior named Eli marches across the ruined landscape, carrying hope for humanity's redemption. Only one other man understands the power of what Eli carries, and he is determined to take it for himself. Though Eli prefers peace, he must risk death to protect his precious cargo, to fulfill his destiny to help restore mankind.

AMC.HD.us2.title: I Am Legend
AMC.HD.us2.description: Robert Neville, a scientist, is a survivor of a man-made plague that transforms humans into mutants. He wanders alone through New York City, calling out for other possible survivors and works on finding a cure for the plague using his own immune blood. Neville knows he is badly outnumbered and the odds are against him. The infected wait for him to make a mistake that will deliver Neville into their hands.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Men in Black
AMC.HD.us2.description: Working for a highly funded yet unofficial government agency, Kay and Jay are the Men in Black, providers of immigration services and regulators of all things alien on Earth. While investigating a series of unregistered close encounters, the MIB agents uncover the deadly plot of an intergalactic terrorist who is on a mission to assassinate two ambassadors from opposing galaxies currently in residence in New York City.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Men in Black II
AMC.HD.us2.description: Kay and Jay reunite to provide our best line of defense against a seductress who levels the toughest challenge yet to the MIB's mission statement: protecting the earth from the scum of the universe. While investigating a routine crime, Jay uncovers a plot masterminded by Serleena, a Kylothian monster who disguises herself as a lingerie model. When Serleena takes the MIB building hostage, there is only one person Jay can turn to -- his former MIB partner.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Men in Black
AMC.HD.us2.description: Working for a highly funded yet unofficial government agency, Kay and Jay are the Men in Black, providers of immigration services and regulators of all things alien on Earth. While investigating a series of unregistered close encounters, the MIB agents uncover the deadly plot of an intergalactic terrorist who is on a mission to assassinate two ambassadors from opposing galaxies currently in residence in New York City.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Propiedad violada; App para enfermedades sexuales
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Laura destruyó el dron de Gino que volaba sobre su propiedad, él pide que se lo pague. Mileidy crea una aplicación para identificar enfermedades sexuales y descubre que su esposo es infiel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de viva Las Vegas!
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El estudio se transforma en una sede de Las Vegas, la ciudad del pecado. ¿Apostarán los concursantes al amor?

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de hombres mujeriegos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Episodio especial de hombres mujeriegos, que no pueden evitar conquistar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de Vikingos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de hombres guapos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El misterio de la astrología y los secretos del amor se unen en el primer programa de citas guiado por los astros.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La bruja de la cuadra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Marcela pierde a su esposo y a su hija en un accidente automovilístico. El dolor la sume en una enorme amargura y, por eso, le dicen bruja.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por precoz se quedó sin sus XV años
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gabriel, decepcionado, suspende la fiesta de 15 años de su hija tras enterarse de que mantiene relaciones sexuales con su novio, y que la madre le compra pastillas anticonceptivas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dedos de hielo; Almas gemelas asesinas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mariana sufre del síndrome de Raynaud que provoca sensibilidad al frío en los dedos, no quiere mudarse a otra ciudad. Nancy fue secuestrada y ahora siente una conexión especial con su captor.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Billetes en carretera; Cambio de edad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: María y Paula causaron un alboroto ante las intimidaciones de Andrés y Sebastián, ellos las demandan. Elvis miente sobre su edad en papeles oficiales y le niegan la ayuda a su hijo autista.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La felicidad no se compra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Al perder a su padre, Ariadna y su familia quedan en la ruina lo que provoca un completo cambio en su vida. Una oportunidad para aprender que la felicidad no se compra con dinero.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los ojos de una madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Aminta pierde la cabeza por amor y su madre, Leonor, intenta hacerla recapacitar mientras lucha contra un cáncer sin que su hija lo sepa. El tiempo le da la razón y descubre al verdadero Ricardo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Regreso inesperado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Amanda decide abandonar a su esposo e hija para irse a los Estados Unidos. Siete años más tarde, regresa inesperadamente con el objetivo de recuperar a su pequeña, pero la niña y su padre ya tienen otra vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mía o de nadie
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cuando Gisela, casi por lástima, acepta salir con Andrés en calidad de amigos, su vida se convierte en una horrible pesadilla que poco a poco la aleja de todas aquellas personas a las que ama.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mis princesas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Brenda y Eloísa, su madre, viven dominadas por Alonso, un hombre violento, machista y misógino que lleva una doble vida, pero cuando la joven entra a la universidad, su historia da un giro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Milagro médico
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe estalla de la furia con Felipa y está a punto de matarla, busca que confiese si asesinó a su madre para ocupar su lugar. Diego comparte su plan con Deivid. Corona sale de la cirugía.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sabia decisión
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Adam y Adolfo, tío y sobrino, quieren ganar un automóvil. María y Leo intentan duplicar los regalos, el tiempo los traiciona. Aminadab y Arely buscan dinero para pagar el título universitario.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Pequeños errores
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Después de tomar decisiones erradas que dejaron a su mejor amiga sin la custodia de su bebé y al hombre que ama en prisión, Nela quiere enderezarlo todo, pero podría quedarse sin tiempo extra.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Está embarazada y sigue en la fiesta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Roberto exige que su novia Jennifer evite el consumo de alcohol, ya que esperan un bebé. Ella se siente sobreprotegida al mudarse con él, tras ser expulsada de la casa de sus padres.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Confié en ella y me robó
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juan descubre que Fabiola toma un reloj y dinero de su pareja actual y se decepciona. La consideraba parte de la familia, lo apoyó con su hija y labores de la casa tras la muerte de su esposa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Difamado por venganza; La novia loca
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Anthony fue investigado por el delito de pornografía infantil, él cree que su suegra lo incriminó. Lina tiene obsesión con casarse, pero Carlos no quiere poner en riesgo su estatus migratorio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Abusado por mi héroe; Testigo ilegal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alejandro fue abusado de niño por un creador de videojuegos, exige compensación aunque su atacante está muerto. Cristian testifica en la corte y lo arrestan, ahora quiere recuperar a su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Soy menopáusica, no loca
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Guadalupe está deprimida y revela que su esposo e hijos la critican y la hieren con comentarios ofensivos en medio de los cambios hormonales de su edad, él incluso la echó de la casa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Problemas de migración
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mientras la Mami Chula planea su salida del negocio, Gavino tiene todo listo para derrotarla. Ella no se imagina lo que se le viene encima. Diego crea la estrategia para su último cruce.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Afeitador pro; Más que tango
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Cristian le exige a su madre el dinero que su padre dejó para sus estudios, pero ese fondo ya no existe. En otro caso, Armando y su profesora bailan tango con mucha pasión y Jenny se molesta.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi nieto abandonado en el aeropuerto; Falsa fortuna
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Grisel quiere la custodia de su nieto porque la mamá, Gabriela, casi lo deja abandonado en el aeropuerto. Además, Edgar encuentra pepitas de oro dentro de los salmones que le vendió Rubén.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de mujeres dominantes
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En este episodio, las mujeres toman el poder y las riendas del amor, mientras ellos se dejan dominar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hombres feos pero con dinero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Estos participantes masculinos no se caracterizan por su belleza, pero el corazón quiere lo que el corazón quiere.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de extravagantes
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En este episodio, los concursantes que van en busca del amor son un poco... extravagantes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de vuelta a la escuela
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Penélope se pone en la piel de una maestra de escuela y pasa lista a los concursantes. Nadie puede llegar tarde a la clase sobre el amor.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La vida entre mis brazos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rafael pierde a su esposa durante el parto de su hija, razón por la cual la repudia y se niega a tenerla entre sus brazos. Sin embargo, una difícil situación en el parque provoca un cambio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Confié en ella y me robó
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juan descubre que Fabiola toma un reloj y dinero de su pareja actual y se decepciona. La consideraba parte de la familia, lo apoyó con su hija y labores de la casa tras la muerte de su esposa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sueño trunchado; Humillado y sin dinero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Antonio no quiere que su hija sea futbolista, porque no tendrá buen futuro, su madre pide la tutela de la joven. Los dueños de una casa confundieron a su empleado con un ladrón y lo lesionaron.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El bebé de mami; La looner
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Omaira pide que su suegra desaloje la casa porque interfiere constantemente en su matrimonio y su esposo actúa como un bebé de mamá. Lina hace videos eróticos con globos de diferentes tamaños.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Libertad robada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Aída es acusada de fraude, condenada injustamente a prisión y obligada a dejar a su bebé. Después de muchos años ella decide luchar por recuperar lo que le robaron.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El trofeo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Antonio abandona repentinamente a su esposa Genara y a su hijo Carlos, pero sus errores lo llevan a prisión. Años después, regresa para pedir perdón.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ángel
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El padre de Elena está enfermo y ella debe hacerse cargo, al ser hija única. Para lograrlo debe aprender a perdonar al hombre que quiso separarla de su esposo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Muerta en vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Esperanza está infectada con VIH, pero como no tiene recursos, no ha sido diagnosticada. Cuando recibe la confirmación de su enfermedad, busca a su marido y la reacción no es la que esperaba.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No te creí
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Estela inicia una nueva relación y nunca se percata de que Humberto, su nueva pareja, acosa a su hija Mariana. A pesar de las advertencias, se niega a aceptarlo hasta que es demasiado tarde.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Problemas de migración
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mientras la Mami Chula planea su salida del negocio, Gavino tiene todo listo para derrotarla. Ella no se imagina lo que se le viene encima. Diego crea la estrategia para su último cruce.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amigos con beneficios
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sergio y José comparten una gran amistad y compiten por un automóvil. Karime y Aldo intentan duplicar sus premios, pero la ambición les juega en contra. Édgar y Samantha desean ganar un viaje.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mundo real
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Marco sufre un grave trastorno antisocial tras caer en una adicción al celular, computadoras y videojuegos, ahora él se ve obligado a tratar de resolver todos los problemas que ha causado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Soy menopáusica, no loca
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Guadalupe está deprimida y revela que su esposo e hijos la critican y la hieren con comentarios ofensivos en medio de los cambios hormonales de su edad, él incluso la echó de la casa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Nos mantienes y te quejas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Miguel está desesperado, su madre se mudó a su casa por problemas de salud. Aunque contribuye con los gastos, la relación con su esposa ha llegado al límite con agresiones físicas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Minutos de vida; Ley del hielo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Paula fue condenada por robar el auto de David y secuestrar al bebé que estaba dentro. Sin embargo, ella alega que el bebé estaba a punto de morir de frío, porque él lo tenía descuidado en el auto mientras se drogaba. La "ley del hielo" no es más que ignorar a la persona con la que se convive y aplicar un silencio sepulcral, que en algún punto puede ser maltrato psicológico. Eso es lo que está haciendo Marcos con su esposa Yésica.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Viaje en deportación; A la luz pública
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: A Camila la van a deportar por culpa a su exjefe Raúl, quien la envió en busca de mercancía y de un amigo ilegal. Mariana demanda a una periodista por informar que había defraudado al gobierno.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No vas a ser sonidero y punto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Nancy está molesta porque su hijo trabaja como DJ y le preocupa ese ambiente. Ella quiere que estudie en la universidad, pero su abuela lo apoya y quiere que lo dejen ir tras sus sueños.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Decir adiós
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En el tribunal de Gavino, Augusto testifica a su favor y suelta la sopa, perjudicando la memoria de su hijastro Eliseo. Isabel se entera de que Diego y Circe se van del país. Fernanda se emociona.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Niña online; El método Konmari
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Carolina se reencuentra con su hija y su esposo, después de tres años, y descubre que la niña vive aislada del mundo. Felicia demanda a su marido por seguir un método japonés para ser feliz.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El pasado oscuro; DUI mató a mi hijo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniel buscó a su esposa por mucho tiempo y, ahora que logra encontrarla, descubre que ella está casada con otro. El marido de Alejandra conducía ebrio y por accidente mata al hijo de Willie.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de peluches & muñecas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El estudio se transforma en una juguetería: las participantes se disfrazan de muñecas y los concursantes se visten como peluches. ¿Encontrarán así el amor?

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hadas del bosque
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El amor está en el aire y las hadas del bosque se quieren divertir.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vampiresas vs. hombres lobo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de hombres guapos pero mantenidos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El valor de la verdad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Julia y Carlos están ilusionados y esperan la llegada de su primer hijo, hasta que la imprudencia de Claudio pone todo en peligro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Nos mantienes y te quejas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Miguel está desesperado, su madre se mudó a su casa por problemas de salud. Aunque contribuye con los gastos, la relación con su esposa ha llegado al límite con agresiones físicas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Auto grande, pito chico; Pánico gay
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniela le exige a Milena una compensación por despido injustificado y por revelar un secreto. Harry pide un masaje prostático, pero al descubrir que el masajista era hombre destruye el local.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Algo podrido; Cincuenta son suficientes
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Walker quiere desalojar a su sobrina e hijastra de la casa porque la chica solo ha vivido como una mantenida sin prestarle atención a sus estudios ni a la gestión de la empresa familiar. Carmen preparó la celebración de la renovación de los votos matrimoniales de sus padres, pero el padre, en plena ceremonia, revela que todo ha sido una farsa y que no está dispuesto a seguir viviendo con alguien por la que no siente nada.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Las galletas de ojos azules
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Pato salva a una señora de ser atropellada y entre ellas comienza una linda relación. Tratando de defender a su nueva amiga, la adolescente termina en el hospital y así se descubre la verdad sobre el lazo que las une.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Rumores que matan
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Liliana es nombrada jefa de enfermeras, pero el ascenso provoca la envidia de su compañera Alexa. Por rencor, ella riega una serie de rumores que le cuestan a Liliana su relación con Alfonso y el trabajo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El hijo arrepentido
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Blanca denuncia a Pablo por golpearla, él va a la cárcel y ella se muda con sus hijos. Diez años después, Pablo intenta recuperar a su familia, pero su hijo se opone.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sin salida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Isabel, divorciada, se enamora de nuevo, pero pronto descubre que su esposo no es quién aparenta ser. Aunque su manipulación y violencia la aprisionan, un error imperdonable la obliga a actuar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vaso frágil
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Esperanza crítica a su madre, quien soporta la violencia y alcoholismo de su esposo, sin imaginar la lección que recibirá al establecer su propia familia, su única opción será pedir ayuda.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Decir adiós
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En el tribunal de Gavino, Augusto testifica a su favor y suelta la sopa, perjudicando la memoria de su hijastro Eliseo. Isabel se entera de que Diego y Circe se van del país. Fernanda se emociona.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Decisión vaquera
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jesús y su hija Shaila quieren escaparse con el dinero en efectivo para irse de vacaciones, la adrenalina no cesa. Las hermanas Brenda y Bere compiten para ganar un viaje a Mazatlán.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi secreto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Silvia se da cuenta de que ha complicado todo en su vida e intenta enmendar errores por el camino correcto, el de la honestidad, aunque no sabe si será suficiente para obtener un tiempo extra.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No vas a ser sonidero y punto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Nancy está molesta porque su hijo trabaja como DJ y le preocupa ese ambiente. Ella quiere que estudie en la universidad, pero su abuela lo apoya y quiere que lo dejen ir tras sus sueños.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Soy rata y a mucha honra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Gabriela asegura que lo único que toma del negocio donde trabaja es el plato de comida para su familia. La hija del dueño llegó hace un mes y detecta abusos tras cuatro años de servicio.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Famoso deportado; El parásito Nini
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Acepta hacer un documental sobre su vida como indocumentado y ahora está en el limbo. También, Edison y Caroline exigen que su hijo abandone la casa y no se acerque más a ellos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Acosador en libertad; ADN vs. cenizas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Vicky demanda por acoso sexual a Lorenzo, pero solo puede probarlo por el lunar en su pene. El esposo de Eliana le deja herencia a ella y a sus hijas, pero aparece Laura y reclama su parte.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Día de las Madres: El valor de ser madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Erika enfrenta el suicidio de su hijo adolescente con mucha fortaleza y sobre todo durante una fecha tan especial para todas las madres. Hoy recibe terapia para encarar una trágica pérdida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La gran victoria de Gavino
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El Capo mueve todas sus fichas y logra su cometido. Empieza su plan de venganza para liquidar a cada uno de sus enemigos y acorralar a Circe. No dejará que nadie escape. Diego busca a Gavino.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La hija del difunto; Peligro en la carretera
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mariana le exige a su madre, Teresa, una compensación económica por los años de abandono que vivió. Maribel se sintió intimidada por Carlos y le propinó una golpiza, él pide una indemnización.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Violado por alma gemela; El rapero sin rap
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Al estar bajo hipnosis Rafael se sintió acosado sexualmente, pide una compensación. El rapero Omni le reclama a Yerald la autoría de una canción, pero no se sabe la letra, porque se la robó.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de mariachis
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de niños
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dalila, la modelo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dalila, modelo de pasarela, fue discriminada en el evento que organizó Karla, le impidieron participar por tener síndrome de Down sin tomar en cuenta su enorme talento para desfilar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Una vida por otra; Conejillo de indias
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La esposa de Armando está secuestrada por la guerrilla colombiana. Los secuestradores piden hacer un intercambio: exigen que se entregue al hijo de ella con uno de los jefes de la guerrilla y la liberan. Además, Ángel está obsesionado con ser parte de las pruebas de medicamentos que hacen las farmacéuticas. Vive de eso y lo ha sufrido porque perdió su erección en uno de los estudios.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Terapia fetal; Pillada por los pelos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La práctica de una terapia japonesa causa un enfrentamiento entre Stephany y Samy. Gabriela fue a Venezuela a recoger unas pelucas y las de su amiga, María, tenían cocaína.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tentaciones ocultas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Michelle está embarazada de Juan, pero al descubrir que son hermanos, él quiere que aborte por los problemas que puede tener la criatura al nacer, ella se niega por no estar bien de salud.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Bikinis y rock
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Unos hermanos se hacen cargo de la fábrica de su padre y descubren que su competencia le roba a sus modelos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Toda la información que buscas antes y después de cada jornada en Premier League: análisis previo, datos clave, protagonistas y el mejor repaso tras los partidos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Toda la acción de la jornada 36 de la temporada regular 2025-26 de la Premier League. Fulham se enfrenta al Bournemouth. Desde el Craven Cottage, en Londres.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Toda la acción de la jornada 36 de la temporada regular 2025-26 de la Premier League. Manchester City se enfrenta al Brentford. Desde el Etihad Stadium, en Mánchester.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Premier League: Extra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Toda la información que buscas antes y después de cada jornada en Premier League: análisis previo, datos clave, protagonistas y el mejor repaso tras los partidos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: ¿Vendimia perfecta?
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Guillermo y Andrés enfrentan un reto que podría hacerlos acreedores de un automóvil. Daniel y Elizabeth necesitan dinero en efectivo para emprender un negocio de renta de videojuegos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amor a lo Romeo y Julieta; Venganza del tigre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Henna y Miguel son incapacitados y quieren ser una familia independiente. Ivelis le exige compensación a Nicolás por publicar en las redes un video íntimo que la pone en ridículo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Artista natural
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Samuel y Chris son un dúo musical de niños, la mánager demanda a la mamá de uno de ellos porque no quiere firmar contrato con un show de televisión que les puede abrir las puertas del éxito.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cupones malditos; Todo para vender
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Enrique no soporta la obsesión de su esposa por los cupones de descuentos, exige terapia psicológica. Anulan el contrato porque se besaron durante el experimento en el que fingían ser hermanos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Día de las Madres: El valor de ser madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Erika enfrenta el suicidio de su hijo adolescente con mucha fortaleza y sobre todo durante una fecha tan especial para todas las madres. Hoy recibe terapia para encarar una trágica pérdida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Premios Platino Xcaret Alfombra Platino
Live: Premios Platino Xcaret 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Desde el majestuoso Teatro Gran Tlachco, en la Riviera Maya, el glamoroso encuentro de la XIII edición de la gala que rinde homenaje a lo mejor del cine y las series iberoamericanas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Adicción sin control; La próxima víctima
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Christian pide que Cecilia le dé una compensación porque se masturbó en su taxi y subió el video a la red. Está asustado porque su esposa es viuda de tres hombres que murieron sospechosamente.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Crisis de opioides; El cartel de las ex
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Yeny pide el divorcio porque su esposo, Héctor, se ha vuelto adicto a los medicamentos. Rodrigo saca a su hija de su país porque fue víctima de un complot de la madre con psicólogos corruptos.
